retry_reason: Failure indicates refcount is saturated (near INT_MAX/2), which is a pathological state that will not be resolved by retrying without a corresponding put by another context.
contract_summary: Conditional get wrapper: increments the refcount on a buffer_ref associated with a pipe_buffer, but only if the refcount is not dangerously high (above INT_MAX/2). Returns true on success, false on failure. The caller must check the return value and, on success, must later call a corresponding put (e.g., buffer_pipe_buf_put) to release the reference. This function prevents refcount overflow and is typically used when acquiring a reference for temporary use.
